#run
```{r}
# ============================================================================
# MaAsLin2 ANALYSIS FOR STRATA (AB, PPI, OTH, NO) – HUMAnN PATHWAYS
# Timepoint -2 vs -1, NEGBIN + TMM, prevalence filter 10/100
# Combined horizontal barplot with dodged bars per stratum
# ============================================================================

library(phyloseq)
library(Maaslin2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(speedyseq)
library(microbiome)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load phyloseq object (HUMAnN pathways)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ps_hm <- readRDS('/RSF_res_4_ps/hm3/RSF_ps_humann_joint_V2.rds')
ps_obj <- ps_hm

# Ensure counts are integers
otu_matrix <- otu_table(ps_obj)
if (is.matrix(otu_matrix)) {
  otu_matrix[] <- round(otu_matrix)
  otu_table(ps_obj) <- otu_table(otu_matrix, taxa_are_rows = taxa_are_rows(otu_table(ps_obj)))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Define Strata (based on original Group and Proton_Pump_Inhibitors)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sam <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_obj), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sam$Strata <- NA_character_
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "A"] <- "AB"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "C"] <- "NO"
sam$Strata[sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "Yes" & is.na(sam$Strata)] <- "PPI"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "B" & is.na(sam$Strata) & sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "No"] <- "OTH"
sam$Strata <- factor(sam$Strata, levels = c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO"))
sample_data(ps_obj) <- sam

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Apply prevalence filter (10% of samples, detection ≥1 count)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
detection <- 1/100
prevalence <- 10/100
core_features <- core_members(ps_obj, detection = detection, prevalence = prevalence, include.lowest = FALSE)
ps_filtered <- prune_taxa(core_features, ps_obj)
cat("Retained", ntaxa(ps_filtered), "pathways after prevalence filter\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Function to run MaAsLin2 for a single stratum (fixed data conversion)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
run_maaslin2_stratum <- function(ps_sub, stratum_name) {
  cat("\n===== Stratum:", stratum_name, "=====\n")
  
  # Subset to timepoints -1 and -2
  ps_sub <- subset_samples(ps_sub, Timepoint %in% c("-1", "-2"))
  if (nsamples(ps_sub) < 4) {
    cat("  SKIP: insufficient samples\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Keep only patients with both timepoints
  meta_st <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_sub))
  patients_both <- meta_st %>%
    group_by(No_Patient) %>%
    summarise(has_both = all(c("-1", "-2") %in% Timepoint)) %>%
    filter(has_both) %>% pull(No_Patient)
  if (length(patients_both) < 2) {
    cat("  SKIP: fewer than 2 paired patients\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  ps_sub <- prune_samples(meta_st$No_Patient %in% patients_both, ps_sub)
  if (nsamples(ps_sub) < 4) {
    cat("  SKIP: insufficient after pairing\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  cat("  Samples after pairing:", nsamples(ps_sub), "\n")
  
  # Remove zero‑sum pathways
  ps_sub <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_sub) > 0, ps_sub)
  if (ntaxa(ps_sub) == 0) {
    cat("  SKIP: no pathways\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  cat("  Pathways after zero removal:", ntaxa(ps_sub), "\n")
  
  # ========== FIXED DATA CONVERSION ==========
  otu_mat <- as.matrix(otu_table(ps_sub))
  if (taxa_are_rows(ps_sub)) {
    # Transpose so rows = samples, columns = features
    otu_mat <- t(otu_mat)
  }
  # Convert to data frame and ensure integer (already counts)
  otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu_mat, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  # Remove any non-numeric entries (should not happen)
  otu_df[] <- lapply(otu_df, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))
  # Replace NA with 0 (rare)
  otu_df[is.na(otu_df)] <- 0
  
  # Metadata
  metadata <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_sub))
  metadata$Timepoint <- factor(metadata$Timepoint, levels = c("-1", "-2"))
  
  # Create output directory
  out_dir <- file.path("/maaslin2_strata", stratum_name)
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Run MaAsLin2
  fit <- Maaslin2(
    input_data = otu_df,
    input_metadata = metadata,
    output = out_dir,
    fixed_effects = "Timepoint",
    reference = "Timepoint,-1",
    normalization = "TMM",
    transform = "NONE",
    analysis_method = "NEGBIN",
    correction = "BH",
    cores = 4,
    max_significance = 0.1,
    plot_heatmap = FALSE,
    plot_scatter = FALSE
  )
  
  results <- fit$results
  if (is.null(results) || nrow(results) == 0) {
    cat("  No results returned\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Filter significant (q ≤ 0.05, |coef| ≥ 1)
  sig <- results %>%
    filter(qval <= 0.05, abs(coef) >= 1)
  cat("  Significant pathways (q≤0.05, |coef|≥1):", nrow(sig), "\n")
  if (nrow(sig) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Prepare plot data
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    Feature = sig$feature,
    Coefficient = sig$coef,
    qval = sig$qval,
    signif = case_when(
      sig$qval <= 0.001 ~ "***",
      sig$qval <= 0.01 ~ "**",
      sig$qval <= 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    Stratum = stratum_name,
    Direction = ifelse(sig$coef > 0, "Enriched_in_-2", "Decreased_in_-2")
  )
  return(plot_data)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Run for each stratum
# ------------------------------------------------------------
strata_names <- c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO")
all_results <- list()
for (st in strata_names) {
  ps_st <- subset_samples(ps_filtered, Strata == st)
  if (nsamples(ps_st) == 0) {
    cat("No samples for stratum", st, "\n")
    next
  }
  res <- run_maaslin2_stratum(ps_st, st)
  if (!is.null(res)) all_results[[st]] <- res
}
if (length(all_results) == 0) stop("No significant results in any stratum")

combined <- bind_rows(all_results)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Create horizontal barplot with dodged bars
# ------------------------------------------------------------
strata_colors_reg <- c("AB" = "#E41A1C", "PPI" = "#377EB8", 
                       "OTH" = "#4DAF4A", "NO" = "#984EA3")
lighten <- function(col, factor = 0.6) {
  rgb(t(col2rgb(col) + (255 - col2rgb(col)) * factor), maxColorValue = 255)
}
strata_colors_light <- sapply(strata_colors_reg, lighten)

combined <- combined %>%
  mutate(FillGroup = paste(Stratum, Direction, sep = "_"))

fill_palette <- c()
for (st in strata_names) {
  fill_palette[paste(st, "Enriched_in_-2", sep = "_")] <- strata_colors_reg[st]
  fill_palette[paste(st, "Decreased_in_-2", sep = "_")] <- strata_colors_light[st]
}

# Order features: most positive to most negative coefficient
feature_order <- combined %>%
  group_by(Feature) %>%
  summarise(max_coef = max(Coefficient), min_coef = min(Coefficient)) %>%
  mutate(order_val = ifelse(max_coef > abs(min_coef), max_coef, min_coef)) %>%
  arrange(desc(order_val)) %>%
  pull(Feature)
combined$Feature <- factor(combined$Feature, levels = feature_order)

p <- ggplot(combined, aes(x = Feature, y = Coefficient, fill = FillGroup)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), width = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = signif,
                y = ifelse(Coefficient >= 0,
                           Coefficient + 0.05 * max(abs(combined$Coefficient)),
                           Coefficient - 0.05 * max(abs(combined$Coefficient)))),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), size = 3, vjust = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Direction",
    values = fill_palette,
    labels = c(
      "AB_Enriched_in_-2" = "AB (enriched at -2)",
      "AB_Decreased_in_-2" = "AB (decreased at -2)",
      "PPI_Enriched_in_-2" = "PPI (enriched at -2)",
      "PPI_Decreased_in_-2" = "PPI (decreased at -2)",
      "OTH_Enriched_in_-2" = "OTH (enriched at -2)",
      "OTH_Decreased_in_-2" = "OTH (decreased at -2)",
      "NO_Enriched_in_-2" = "NO (enriched at -2)",
      "NO_Decreased_in_-2" = "NO (decreased at -2)"
    )
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9, colour = 'black'),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "MaAsLin2: Timepoint -2 vs -1 (NEGBIN + TMM)",
    x = "Pathway",
    y = "Coefficient (positive = increased at -2)"
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Save outputs
# ------------------------------------------------------------
out_dir <- "/maaslin2_strata_combined"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "strata_maaslin2_barplot.png"), p, 
       width = 18, height = max(8, nrow(combined)*0.3), limitsize = FALSE, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "strata_maaslin2_barplot.pdf"), p, 
       width = 18, height = max(8, nrow(combined)*0.3), limitsize = FALSE)

for (st in names(all_results)) {
  write.csv(all_results[[st]], file.path(out_dir, paste0("maaslin2_sig_", st, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}
write.csv(combined, file.path(out_dir, "maaslin2_all_sig_combined.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nAll results saved in:", out_dir, "\n")
```
